items.summary: The IEA said Wednesday that its 32 member countries would release 400 million barrels of oil from emergency reserves.

items.headline: Petco is leaning on services, fresh food and pet tarantulas — and it is paying off
items.summary: Shares of Petco Health & Wellness jumped after hours on Wednesday after the pet-supplies retailer said it expects sales to rebound this year, as efforts to overhaul its store selections and lean more into services like dog grooming and training are starting to pay off.

items.headline: Dow futures down nearly 500 points as oil prices continue to climb

items.headline: Iran war: Trump will release 172 million barrels of oil from Strategic Petroleum Reserve
